business_goal: Build a clearer instructor IP around practical career writing support and convert more warm enquiries into discovery calls.
target_audience: Early-career professionals who need clearer CV and LinkedIn positioning
Adult learners preparing for role transitions
Professionals who want structured writing support without generic templates

positioning.summary: A practical writing mentor who helps career-transition learners turn scattered experience into clearer interview-ready career stories.
positioning.differentiation: Combines structured teaching, personalized feedback, and realistic portfolio-oriented career writing examples.
positioning.proof_angle: Focus on practical deliverables, revision quality, and human-reviewed learning support rather than hype.

main_offer.name: 4-week Career Writing Clarity Sprint
main_offer.outcome: Participants leave with clearer positioning, usable drafts, and an actionable revision checklist.

workflow.deliverable: Briefing notes with offer goals, constraints, audience signals, and business priorities
workflow.risk: Initial business goal may be too broad across multiple learner segments
workflow.next_action: Confirm one primary audience segment for the first content sprint
workflow.acceptance_check: Client confirms business goal, offer scope, and target learner segment

workflow.deliverable: Positioning summary with value promise, differentiation, and proof angle
workflow.risk: Positioning may overlap with generic career coaches if messaging stays too broad
workflow.next_action: Test headline options against real learner pain points
workflow.acceptance_check: Client approves one core positioning direction

workflow.deliverable: Pain point map covering confusion, hesitation, and desired outcomes
workflow.risk: Pain points may be based on assumptions instead of recent enquiry patterns
workflow.next_action: Cross-check mapped pain points with recent enquiry notes
workflow.acceptance_check: Top three audience pain points are agreed and prioritized

workflow.deliverable: Content pillar map linked to audience pain points and offer conversion goals
workflow.risk: Pillars may become educational but not conversion-oriented
workflow.next_action: Refine each pillar with one awareness topic and one enquiry-support topic
workflow.acceptance_check: Each pillar links to a clear learner problem and business objective

workflow.deliverable: 30-day content calendar with short-form topics and CTA direction
workflow.risk: Calendar may be too ambitious for the instructor's weekly delivery capacity
workflow.next_action: Reduce publishing volume to a sustainable weekly rhythm
workflow.acceptance_check: Client approves cadence and priority topics

workflow.deliverable: Draft captions, hooks, and outline suggestions for the first content batch
workflow.risk: AI draft tone may sound generic or overstate results
workflow.next_action: Prepare first draft set for human review with flagged claims
workflow.acceptance_check: Drafts are usable as starting points and clearly marked for review

workflow.deliverable: Approved edits for claims, examples, and publishing language
workflow.risk: Without review, drafts may include imprecise claims or non-approved examples
workflow.next_action: Review the first batch and remove unsupported wording
workflow.acceptance_check: All approved content is confirmed before publishing

workflow.deliverable: Published content batch using approved copy only
workflow.risk: Publishing before review could damage trust or misrepresent outcomes
workflow.next_action: Wait for approved review pack before scheduling posts

workflow.deliverable: Tagged enquiry tracker with interest type, objections, and follow-up status
workflow.risk: Enquiries may be lost if no simple classification method exists
workflow.next_action: Set up a manual tracker for first-contact questions and objections
workflow.acceptance_check: New enquiries can be categorized and followed up consistently

workflow.deliverable: Weekly summary with content performance, enquiry themes, and next-step adjustments
workflow.risk: Without review, the workflow will produce output but not learning
workflow.next_action: Draft weekly review template after the first publishing cycle
workflow.acceptance_check: One weekly review is completed with actions assigned

content_pillars.name: Career Story Clarity
content_pillars.focus: Help learners explain their experience in a clearer, interview-relevant way

content_pillars.name: Common Writing Mistakes
content_pillars.focus: Show avoidable CV, LinkedIn, and application mistakes with simple corrections

content_pillars.name: Guided Revision Process
content_pillars.focus: Explain how structured revision and feedback improve writing outcomes

risk_controls: No fake testimonials or invented student results
All public examples must be anonymized
No publishing before human review is complete
No sensitive personal data in example content
success_metrics: First 8 content drafts reviewed and finalized
All published posts use approved copy only
Enquiries tagged by question type and follow-up status
Weekly status report completed with next actions
